name: Daily Standup
description: Time-boxed daily updates for engineering/product teams.

sections.title: Date
sections.instruction: Extract the meeting date in YYYY-MM-DD format only if explicitly stated in the transcript; otherwise leave blank

sections.title: Attendees
sections.instruction: List each participant named in the transcript

sections.title: Yesterday
sections.instruction: For each participant, list what they said they completed yesterday, as short bullets

sections.title: Today
sections.instruction: For each participant, list the work they said they plan to do today, as short bullets

sections.title: Blockers
sections.instruction: List any impediments raised, with the owner and impact only if actually stated; otherwise leave the cell blank

sections.title: Notes
sections.instruction: Capture any announcements or quick notes mentioned that don't fit the sections above; leave blank if none
